All Classes All Packages

L

Layer - Interface in minet.layer
An interface for all layers.
Linear - Class in minet.layer
A class for linear layers (Y = XW + b)
Linear(int, int, Linear.WeightInit) - Constructor for class minet.layer.Linear
 
Linear(DoubleMatrix, DoubleMatrix) - Constructor for class minet.layer.Linear
 
Linear.WeightInit - Interface in minet.layer
An interface for weight initialization.
Linear.WeightInitNorm - Class in minet.layer
Generate a weight matrix from a normal distribution N(mean, std).
Linear.WeightInitUniform - Class in minet.layer
Generate a weight matrix from a uniform distribution U(minVal, maxVal)
Linear.WeightInitXavier - Class in minet.layer
Generate a weight matrix using Xavier's method ( see paper, equation 10).
loadDatasets(String, String, String) - Static method in class minet.example.MNISTClassifier
 
loadTxt(String) - Static method in class minet.Dataset
Loading instances stored in a txt file, whose format is as follows.
Loss - Interface in minet.loss
An interface for all loss functions.
